steps.title: Focus on the task
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference in the origins of two spelling bee words. The response must name both words and make their different linguistic sources clear.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice B compares the two winners but never mentions where either word comes from. Choice C gives only the origin of "Laodicean," so it cannot contrast two origins. Choice D says the spelling bee uses words from diverse origins, but it stays general and does not identify the source of each word. Choice A names "guerdon" as Anglo-French and "Laodicean" as ancient Greek, using "while" to show the contrast. The answer is A.
